title: Human vs. Machine Sentence Classifier
description: Unveil the authenticity of text with this innovative classifier that distinguishes human-written sentences from AI-generated ones using advanced models 🤖. By default, it leverages OpenRouter's free deepseek model, with optional integration of Google's Gemini 2.5-pro via the GenAI SDK, ensuring flexible and powerful detection capabilities. Crafted prompts instruct the AI to output simple binary classifications (1 for human, 0 for machine), making it ideal for evaluating datasets in TSV format 📊. Effortless setup with uv virtual environments, secure API key management in home directories, and CLI-driven evaluations compute key metrics like accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and confusion matrices—saving results as JSON for easy analysis ⚙️. Designed for researchers and developers, it handles rate limits with delays and includes unit tests for reliability. Explore prompt tweaks and multi-model comparisons to boost performance in the evolving AI landscape, paving the way for future enhancements like batching and optimized packaging 🚀. (142 words)
description_small: Detect human vs. AI text like a pro! 🤖👤 This classifier uses OpenRouter (default) or Google Gemini to score sentences via clever prompts. 📝 Prep TSV data, run evals for accuracy, F1 & more. 🔍 Quick uv setup + secure API keys. 🚀
